rows.label: tev000694_MSG0001
rows.name: Hey there, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0002
rows.name:
Care to join us? I was just having a
drink with my new Larsian friend here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0003
rows.name:
He was telling me how tough it is to be the eldest son
in a Larsian family. Lots of responsibility having to
inherit the family name and sword and all that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0004
rows.name:
I had it pretty tough, too. When I was born, it was
just me—but then one day, all outta the blue, everyone
said I had to start acting like a big brother.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0005
rows.name:
Worse still, my little brother was better than
me at just about everything. That's how I got
all bitter and ended up the way I am today.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0006
rows.name:
So how about it? If you were in our
situation, which brother would you
rather be? Older or younger?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_JNK0010
rows.name: Older

rows.label: tev000694_SEL0011
rows.name:
Say that you'd rather
be an older brother.

rows.label: tev000694_JNK0020
rows.name: Younger

rows.label: tev000694_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say that you'd rather
be a younger brother.

rows.label: tev000694_JNK0030
rows.name: Neither

rows.label: tev000694_SEL0031
rows.name: Say that you'd rather be an only child.

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0007
rows.name:
Glutton for punishment, huh? Just
like me and my Larsian friend here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0008
rows.name:
Of course, I bet younger brothers complain
they got it worse. But you just gotta review
the history to see who's actually right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0009
rows.name:
Let's compare grades back
in school, for instance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0010
rows.name:
I averaged about a B-minus.
Er, give or take.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0011
rows.name:
Then Fog Christoph came along and started
getting A-pluses across the board! You wouldn't
believe the praise they lavished on him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0012
rows.name:
"Look how much smarter he is than
Frye!" Pffft. Buncha crap, but
people just couldn't get over it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0013
rows.name:
You ask me, it's not really fair to compare
old report cards if you don't pay attention
to how a person has grown since, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0014
rows.name:
And what was I supposed to
do with that? Argue? I'd look
like an even bigger fool![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0015
rows.name:
So I just bottled up all
that resentment instead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0016
rows.name:
Looking back on it, I probably should've
tried to stay ahead of Fog Christoph.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0017
rows.name:
But that never really
occurred to me at the time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0018
rows.name:
Course, that's all water
under the bridge.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0019
rows.name:
Fog Christoph is Fog Christoph
and Frye is me, ya know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0020
rows.name:
And I don't see him being
better than me. No way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0021
rows.name: Taking the easy way out, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0022
rows.name:
But you know what? I bet you'd
actually have made a pretty
awesome little brother.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0023
rows.name:
Fog Christoph was always an indoor kind
of kid. We barely ever played together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0024
rows.name:
He was kinda sickly, too. He'd get heatstroke if we
ever played in direct sun for more than 10 minutes.
Plus migraines. And don't get me going on allergies![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0025
rows.name:
But you and me? We'd have gone hunting and
kayaking and played stickball together and
all that. We would have had a ton of fun![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0026
rows.name:
Luckily for Fog Christoph, he's
got a Blue Blood now, so I guess
he ain't sickly anymore. Huh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0027
rows.name:
Maybe once things have settled
down a bit, me and him can go
fishing together or something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0028
rows.name: Aw, come on! You don't mean that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0029
rows.name:
You don't remember stuff from before
you got here, right? So you've
probably forgotten your family.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0030
rows.name:
Well trust me—even when you hate
him, it's good to have a brother.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0031
rows.name:
Even after being dumped on this
weird planet, I still feel a kind
of bond that can never be broken.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0032
rows.name:
Having family just feels different
from having friends. It's weird.
I can't explain it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000694_MSG0033
rows.name:
You should give it a shot. Even if you don't
have siblings, you can still piece together
a family from folks you meet, you know?[ST:wait ]
